turn.speaker: 系统架构师
turn.content: 好的，我们开始搭建这个物流管理系统。首先需要建立基础层，包含三个核心架构组：用户界面层、API接口层和命令系统层。

metadata.alignment_note: Directly establishes Stage 1 by explicitly naming the three core groups (UI, API, Command System) matching delta_ops group_1, group_2, group_3.

state_before.rendered_mermaid: graph TD

turn.speaker: 技术总监
turn.content: 同意，用户界面层负责前端交互，API层提供统一接口，命令系统处理指令下发。请问基础节点如何规划？

metadata.alignment_note: Confirms Stage 1 scope by referencing the three groups and asking about node planning, consistent with delta_ops structure.

state_before.rendered_mermaid: graph TD

planner.notes: Created three core architecture groups: User Interface, API Interface, and Command System layers.

turn.speaker: 系统架构师
turn.content: 我建议先用九个核心节点覆盖主要业务：车队管理、运单追踪、配送路线和仓库管理这四个类型，每个类型至少分配两个节点确保冗余。

metadata.alignment_note: Maps directly to the 9 nodes in delta_ops: TG/WA/FA/MW for types (Fleet/Tracking/Route/Warehouse), plus RT/CH/BCH/IMCH/MDCH for redundancy.

state_before.rendered_mermaid: graph TD

turn.speaker: 后端工程师
turn.content: 明白，这样UI、API和命令系统三个组各自能关联到相应的物流节点，基础架构就初步成型了。

metadata.alignment_note: Wraps up Stage 1 by confirming the three groups (UI/API/Command) are linked to logistics nodes, matching the bootstrap completion.

gate.reason: turn 4 reached end boundary for stage 2

state_before.rendered_mermaid: graph TD

planner.notes: Added 9 core nodes across 3 groups covering fleet, tracking, routing, and warehouse management.
